description:
Audio Library is one of the most trusted platforms dedicated to providing Background and No Copyright Music for content creators.

✨ *FREE DOWNLOAD HERE:*  https://audiolibrary.com.co/tubebackr-and-ferco/onyx


✅ *HOW DO I MONETIZE MY VIDEO WITH THIS TRACK?* 

You can use this song for *FREE* in any YouTube video and monetize it—just make sure to include the following in your description *(copy and paste into your description)* 👇

––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––
Music: ONYX by Ferco & tubebackr https://soundcloud.com/fercomusic
License: Creative Commons — Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 3.0 Unported — CC BY-NC-SA 3.0
Free Download / Stream: https://audiolibrary.com.co/tubebackr-and-ferco/onyx
Music promoted by Audio Library: https://youtu.be/mU2a4E4r8GI
––––––––––––––––––––––––––––––


🎶 *ABOUT THE SONG* 

Experience the sleek and *Futuristic* sounds of "ONYX" from the talented Ferco & tubebackr. Designed for a *Professional* audience, this track provides a *Smooth* yet *Dynamic* backdrop for tech reviews and product *Showcase* videos. It strikes the perfect balance between sophistication and modern rhythm, ensuring your projects stand out with a polished, high-end feel.


🎶 *KEY MUSICAL SEGMENTS FROM THE SONG* 

0:00 - Intro: Smooth electronic pads set a curious, building mood.
0:15 - Main Groove: A steady beat enters with bright, rhythmic synths.
0:45 - Expansion: Layered melodies add depth and driving energy.
1:15 - Melodic Bridge: Atmospheric break focusing on soft synth textures.
1:30 - Full Energy: All elements combine for a powerful final peak.


🎧 *LISTEN ON YOUR FAVORITE PLATFORMS* 

Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/6W6vNS0inxbn4czJ8Zp0rj
iTunes: https://music.apple.com/co/song/onyx/1852744786
YouTube Music: https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=1bDZP2STlX0


👋 *GET IN TOUCH WITH FERCO* 

https://fercomusic.com
https://x.com/fercomusic
https://instagram.com/fercomusic

👋 *GET IN TOUCH WITH TUBEBACKR* 

tubebackrmusic@gmail.com
https://instagram.com/tubebackr_music
https://www.tubebackrmusic.com


⚠️ *HOW TO USE THIS MUSIC FOR FREE (GUIDELINES)* 

-  You must include full credits in your video description.
-  You cannot claim the music as your own.
-  You cannot sell, license, or distribute the music in any form.
-  You cannot remove or alter any part of the credits.
-  You cannot use this music as background for your own musical compositions without the artist’s explicit consent.
-  If you wish to use this music in projects outside of YouTube, you must obtain permission from the artist.
-  Failure to comply with these guidelines may result in a copyright claim or strike.
-  If you have any questions or need further clarification, please contact the artist directly.


🔥 *MORE FREE MUSIC FROM AUDIO LIBRARY* 

Spotify playlists: https://spoti.fi/3XTlK4h
Official Releases: https://www.youtube.com/c/audiolibraryplus


❤️ *GET IN TOUCH WITH AUDIO LIBRARY*
